assertions.evidence:
FAIL test/display.test.js
  ✓ Format no formatStr (11ms)
  ✓ Format invalid date (13ms)
  ✓ Format Year YY YYYY (3ms)
  ✓ Format Month M MM MMM MMMM (52ms)

  ✓ Format meridiens a A am / pm (8ms)
  ✓ Format Minute m mm (1ms)
  ✓ Format Second s ss SSS (2ms)
  ✓ Format Time Zone ZZ (15ms)
  ✓ Format ddd dd MMM with short locale (9ms)

  ✓ Format Escaping characters (1ms)
  ✓ Unix Timestamp (milliseconds) (1ms)
  ✓ Unix Timestamp (seconds) (1ms)
  ✓ Days in Month (1ms)
  ✓ Utc Offset (1ms)
  ✓ As Javascript Date -> toDate (1ms)
  ✓ As JSON -> toJSON (41ms)
  ✓ As ISO 8601 String -> toISOString e.g. 2013-02-04T22:44:30.652Z
  ✕ Year 1 formatted with YYYY should pad with zeroes (4ms)
  ✕ Year 1 formatting matches moment format (2ms)
  Difference
    ✓ empty -> default milliseconds (6ms)
    ✓ diff -> none dayjs object (3ms)
    ✓ diff -> in seconds, minutes, hours, days, weeks, months, quarters, years  (16ms)
    ✓ Special diff in month according to moment.js (23ms)
    ✓ MonthDiff (2ms)
    ✓ undefined edge case (1ms)

  ● Year 1 formatted with YYYY should pad with zeroes

    expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality
    
    Expected value to be:
      "0001"
    Received:
      "1"

      265 |   const date = new Date(1, 0, 1)
      266 |   date.setUTCFullYear(1) // Required because 0-99 are parsed as 19xx in JS: https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/JavaScript/Reference/Global_Objects/Date/Date#year
    > 267 |   expect(dayjs(date).format('YYYY')).toBe('0001')
      268 | })
      269 |
      270 | it('Year 1 formatting matches moment format', () => {
      
      at Object.<anonymous> (test/display.test.js:267:38)

  ● Year 1 formatting matches moment format

    expect(received).toBe(expected) // Object.is equality
    
    Expected value to be:
      "0001"
    Received:
      "1"

      271 |   const date = new Date(1, 0, 1)
      272 |   date.setUTCFullYear(1)
    > 273 |   expect(dayjs(date).format('YYYY')).toBe(moment(date).format('YYYY'))
      274 | })
      275 |
      
      at Object.<anonymous> (test/display.test.js:273:38)
